items.html: *And one must know: it is known that the Itra [crown] of Hesed is male, and the Itra of Gevura is female. How, then, is it possible that from the female Itra of Gevura male souls should come out? To understand this, we must also explain this matter to you at its first root — namely, what difference and distinction there is among the upper Lights, such that this one is called male and that one is called female.
